localizations.title: The Birmingham Murder
localizations.hiddenObject_2: Crime scene: The newsboy may have witnessed the crime.
localizations.hiddenObject_3: Did you look near Rick's bed?
localizations.hint_1: The boss lives in a house featuring a blue front door flanked by a pair of columns.
localizations.hint_5: Not only is it useful for shooting but also for encouraging cooperation from even the most difficult people.
localizations.hint_10: These casings are of the same caliber as the guns your gang uses. Curious, isn't it?
localizations.hint_13_first: Remember, your boss told you that the bobbies are in the gang's pocket.
localizations.hint_13: Rick was 29. This might be important information.
localizations.hint_21_first: She was struck in the face, hard enough that an imprint of an anchor left a mark on her.
localizations.hint_21: Rick's birthday was yesterday. Therefore, you can determine his date of birth.
localizations.hint_23: Your gang has a fearsome reputation. You can use this fact to make uncooperative people talk.
localizations.hint_36: There is an anchor on Rick's signet ring.
localizations.hint_39: Someone has most likely lost this cufflink. This could be important.
localizations.hint_44: You want to capture him alive for interrogation. Find a way to knock him out.
localizations.hint_52_first: A detail in this scene should allow you to determine which window it is from the other side.
localizations.hint_52: Look at the card backs for a window with a blue towel hanging from it.
localizations.hint_56: The lad would probably be more talkative if he knew you were in the gang.
localizations.hint_59_first: Rick was following these men, so he must have had something to indicate which table they were sitting at.
localizations.hint_59: By looking at the piece of paper found in Rick's hand, you should be able to determine which table you are looking for.
localizations.hint_67_first: Allan flees to the upper floor. Find the corresponding card.
localizations.hint_67: Identify the card depicting the floor above card 67.
localizations.hint_70: You are going to have to find some way to convince the cabbie to help you.
localizations.hint_72_first: There's no need to start a gang war with the Irish. Find another way.
localizations.hint_72: Maybe a bribe will get him to talk. If you don't have any money, you'll need to find some first.
localizations.hint_75_first: You can recreate the street shown on the map by using the backs of the remaining cards. You'll need 6 cards to do so.
localizations.hint_75: One one side, place cards 1 (top of dog), 80 (cat), and 44 (lamp post) side-by-side. On the other side (rotated to face the other way), place cards 99 (dog's legs), 57 (reflection), and 50 (lamp light).
localizations.hint_79: The newspaper is dated 1920. You will need that date to unlock the briefcase.
localizations.hint_87: With the information the bartender gave you, you should be able to track down Allan's location.
localizations.hint_90_first: The 6 numbers are grouped into 3 pairs. Quite unusual!
localizations.hint_90: This format reminds you of a date. What's Rick's date of birth?
localizations.hint_94: To get hold of them, try to find a card depicting an Irish pub.
localizations.hint_123_first: To find both the crime scene and Rick's apartment, look closely at the backs of the cards. They will help you find them.
localizations.hint_123: On the back of card 13, you can see the reflection of the crime scene in the window of a storefront. The boss gave you information about Rick's apartment. On one of the cards you will see a partial sign above a storefront reading "Broom, Reid & Harris" on both cards Y and B. Knowing that Rick lived above the store, you should flip card B to get there.
localizations.answer_hint_1: Find the card matching the description of your boss' home that she gave you on card K.
localizations.answer_hint_13: Show him your cap. That should encourage him to cooperate.
localizations.answer_hint_21: The calendar in Rick's bedroom (B) shows December 14. Since his birthday was yesterday, that means he was born on December 13. However, you still need to find his birth year.
localizations.answer_hint_44: Use the knife from the briefcase (Y: 40) to cut the rope (+40).
localizations.answer_hint_56: Show your cap to the boy.
localizations.answer_hint_59: Choose the table that's 3 away from the entrance.
localizations.answer_hint_67: The back of card 52 fits perfectly above the back of card 67.
localizations.answer_hint_70: Your pistol should convince him to help you.
localizations.answer_hint_75: On card 99, you can see Allan running away. Therefore, you need to click on that part of the map.
localizations.answer_hint_87: Take the card that has a door matching the bartender's description.
localizations.answer_hint_90: To find Rick's birth year, subtract his age from the current year. His wife will help you determine the month and day.
localizations.answer_hint_94: Everything indicates that the Dubliner is an Irish pub.
localizations.answer_hint_123: Once you've caught the murderer, you can take card (43), which has a door matching the description the boss gave you.
localizations.machine_75: You see Allan run into an old warehouse. You should be able to trap him in there!
localizations.machine_43_early: You have nothing to do here for the time being. You must find the murderer.
localizations.machine_43_kid_intro: Yeah? Whaddya want? I'm tryin' to sell papers here!
localizations.machine_43_kid_card_5: Oh! I've seen a gun like that before!
localizations.machine_43_kid_card_10: These are the casings you picked up near the body. He fired at him while they were chattin'. That's all I saw.
localizations.machine_43_hannah_intro: What do you want to know?
localizations.machine_43_hannah_card_39_1: This isn't one of Rick's cufflinks, but I found it next to your bed. Where did it come from?
localizations.machine_43_hannah_card_39_2: Well, yes, you're right; the cufflink is not Rick's. I've been seeing someone else, but Rick found out… But I had nothing to do with his disappearance! Honest!
localizations.machine_43_hannah_card_36: Rick found out that I was seeing another man, so he got angry and starting hitting me. Sometimes, I think I should have left him long ago. But I had nothing to do with his disappearance, I swear!
localizations.machine_43_hannah_card_10_1: These look like casings from Rick's pistol. That's all I know! Wait! Did something happen to Rick? Please, tell me!
localizations.machine_43_barman_intro: What do you want to know?
localizations.machine_43_barman_card_39: Nice cufflink! It won't do much good without the other one, though!
localizations.machine_43_barman_card_94: Ah, yes. I've seen this guy before. Each time he comes in, he's always braggin' about something or other. He's told so many stories that I've stopped believin' them all. If ye ask me, he's a damn liar. But what harm is it to tell a tale or two, as long as it ain't hurtin' anybody.
localizations.machine_43_barman_card_10: These look like casings. So what? I'm not a gun dealer, I can't help ye with these.
localizations.machine_43_robert_intro_1: I had no idea you and Rick were so close. You chased after him like an angry mutt. That was quite a surprise! Have you calmed down at all?
localizations.machine_43_robert_intro_2: Yeah, don't worry. I can't help but feel sorry for Hannah, now that she's all alone. Poor lass.
localizations.machine_43_robert_intro_4: Er… yes… I mean no, just a little. Why do you care?
localizations.machine_43_robert_intro_5: You'll never guess what I found at Rick's place… something that didn't belong to him!
localizations.machine_43_robert_card_39: Ok, fine. Hannah and I were having an affair. It was going so well, but then Rick, the bloody lout, must have found out about it and started beating her. I had no choice, Stevenson. He was hitting her like a punch bag. I couldn't let him get away with it. You saw her face afterward! Please, don't tell anyone!
localizations.machine_43_dialog_retry: You're on the wrong trail. Keep searching for the answers.
localizations.end_allan: Robert was the one who killed him. But all's well that ends well. Now, it's time to have a drink. Robert decides to leave, making up an excuse of having a lot to do. You stay behind with the boss, as you realize the future is going to get messy now that you have a gang war with the Irish on your hands.
localizations.end_robert: The boss's henchmen grab Robert. He screams all sorts of names at you as they take him outside, but he's no longer your concern… is he? And Rick's wife should have known better. The boss congratulates you, but the victory leaves a bitter taste in your mouth...
localizations.end_me: The boss's henchman grab you. You don't resist as they escort you with dead silence to another room, the boss right behind. They close the door behind them in what sounds like a long and agonizing screech. The boss snaps her fingers, singalling one of the goons to turn the record player on. The end of your life is excruciatingly painful, your cries drowned out by the music.
localizations.end_kid: The kid was in the wrong place at the wrong time. After what he's seen, though, you can't risk letting him tell things about your game to whoever will listen. So, between him or Robert, you make your choice quickly. You cut your teeth on the streets as a lad yourself, so you know the rules as well as he does. At least, that's what you keep telling yourself as you try, and fail, to fall asleep.
localizations.end_hannah: This whole thing was Hannah's fault, after all. Had she stayed faithful to Rick, none of this would have happened. She must deal with the consequences of her choices. You won't expose Robert, who's been your friend for a long time; nor will you risk starting a gang war for her sake. You only hope that Robert will one day understand.
localizations.machine_43_instructions: You are running out of time. Choose someone you'd like to speak with before reporting back to the boss.
localizations.machine_43_photo_instructions: You only get one go at this. Choose wisely!
localizations.machine_43_boss_dialog: So, did you find out who did it?
localizations.machine_43_accuse_allan: It was an Irishman named Allan. Robert took care of him.
localizations.machine_43_accuse_kid: It was some street newsboy who happened to be passing by!
localizations.machine_43_accuse_hannah: His wife did it out of revenge.
localizations.machine_75_intro: You follow Allan in a taxi until you see him make a left turn. Reconstruct the street you saw Allan go down, then select the building in which he might have hidden himself.
